messages.content:
MODEL_PATH="/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/multilingual_reasoning/ft_outputs/Qwen3-8B_lst/nemotron_math_10k_mix_ar_fr_ko_zh_nothink_b4_t16_epoch1_20251230_212050" _\_ TASK_TYPE="idle" \ LANG="" \ bash submit_eval_job.sh
  
外面循环一层，LANG的取值从
```shellscript
EVAL_LANGS:-"en zh es hu fr de ru ja th sw bn te ar ko vi cs sr"
```
里面遍历

你可以这样修改脚本来实现外层循环遍历所有语言：

```bash
MODEL_PATH="/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/multilingual_reasoning/ft_outputs/Qwen3-8B_lst/nemotron_math_10k_mix_ar_fr_ko_zh_nothink_b4_t16_epoch1_20251230_212050"
TASK_TYPE="idle"
EVAL_LANGS="en zh es hu fr de ru ja th sw bn te ar ko vi cs sr"

for LANG in $EVAL_LANGS; do
    echo "Processing language: $LANG"
    LANG="$LANG" MODEL_PATH="$MODEL_PATH" TASK_TYPE="$TASK_TYPE" bash submit_eval_job.sh
done
```

或者如果你想要更简洁的写法：

```bash
MODEL_PATH="/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/multilingual_reasoning/ft_outputs/Qwen3-8B_lst/nemotron_math_10k_mix_ar_fr_ko_zh_nothink_b4_t16_epoch1_20251230_212050"

for LANG in en zh es hu fr de ru ja th sw bn te ar ko vi cs sr; do
    echo "Evaluating language: $LANG"
    MODEL_PATH="$MODEL_PATH" TASK_TYPE="idle" LANG="$LANG" bash submit_eval_job.sh
done
```

如果你想让这些任务并行运行（而不是串行），可以在后面加 `&`：

```bash
MODEL_PATH="/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/multilingual_reasoning/ft_outputs/Qwen3-8B_lst/nemotron_math_10k_mix_ar_fr_ko_zh_nothink_b4_t16_epoch1_20251230_212050"

for LANG in en zh es hu fr de ru ja th sw bn te ar ko vi cs sr; do
    echo "Submitting job for language: $LANG"
    MODEL_PATH="$MODEL_PATH" TASK_TYPE="idle" LANG="$LANG" bash submit_eval_job.sh &
done

wait  # 等待所有后台任务完成
```

选择哪种方式取决于：
- **串行执行**（不加 `&`）：任务按顺序执行，适合资源有限的情况
- **并行执行**（加 `&`）：所有任务同时提交，适合有充足资源且想加快速度的情况
